description: Monitor Istio service mesh health, traffic, latency, errors, and control plane metrics using Prometheus metrics from Envoy sidecars and Istiod.
title: Istio Service Mesh

90741dca-e5ed-44f9-8cf6-724ec2de789b.description: Kubernetes namespace to filter Istio metrics
90741dca-e5ed-44f9-8cf6-724ec2de789b.name: namespace
90741dca-e5ed-44f9-8cf6-724ec2de789b.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'namespace') AS namespace
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'istio_requests_total'
GROUP BY namespace

994df8bb-eb1b-41bd-b611-4a598c6951ce.description: Destination service name for filtering traffic
994df8bb-eb1b-41bd-b611-4a598c6951ce.name: destination_service
994df8bb-eb1b-41bd-b611-4a598c6951ce.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'destination_service') AS destination_service
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'istio_requests_total'
GROUP BY destination_service

a97b509a-094d-4df0-afce-f637b3ad8881.description: Deployment environment tag (if available via OTel resource attributes)
a97b509a-094d-4df0-afce-f637b3ad8881.name: deployment_environment
a97b509a-094d-4df0-afce-f637b3ad8881.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment.environment') AS `deployment.environment`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'istio_requests_total'
GROUP BY `deployment.environment`
